name: QUIETVAULT
brief: A credential/token stealer (GitHub/npm tokens) that, beyond its primary targets, invokes AI prompts and on-host installed AI CLI tools to search the infected system for additional secrets, then exfiltrates via attacker-created public GitHub repos. Novel abuse of the victim's own AI tooling. GTIG
categories: LL Models used for backdoor deployment
ttpMd:
**LL Models used for backdoor deployment** (on-host AI abused for collection) T1552 - Unsecured Credentials

T1119 - Automated Collection

T1567 - Exfiltration Over Web Service
